title: GLOWING+
description: A emissive resourcepack, providing various emissive support for MC mods (not just ores), and being more friendly to your eyes!
body:
A emissive resource pack (more than just ores), ~~which is a secondary creation branch of 7777777_4547's Glowing resource pack~~,  
**Note: Starting from version number (0.1), it has been changed to an add-on and requires the [Glowing](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/glowing) resource pack to run. When loaded with a higher priority than Glowing (placed above it in the resource pack screen), the modified ancient debris texture will be activated.**  
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.bbsmc.net/bbsmc/data/cached_images/7599fd227f08a0563a2a9254f75cf81807de4acb.png)
Compared to the original Glowing, some textures have had their emissive parts modified, and some entities also have self-luminous features. Supports emissive textures for more modded ores, making it more eye-friendly!

**Dependencies:**

[OptiFine](https://www.optifine.net/) (If using [Fabric](https://fabricmc.net/), install [OptiFabric](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/optifabric))

or  
**(Most Recommended!)**  
**Fabric Environment**:  
[Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity) (If [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) version ≤ 0.5.11, install [Indium](https://modrinth.com/mod/indium)) + [Entity Texture Features [ETF]](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)

**(Neo)Forge Environment (1.20.1+)** :  
[Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity) (Load via [Sinytra Connector](https://connector.sinytra.org/), it's recommended to also install [Connector Extras](https://modrinth.com/mod/connector-extras) to fix some issues with mod texture support after translation) (If [Embeddium](https://modrinth.com/mod/embeddium) version ≤ 0.3.19, install [Lazurite](https://modrinth.com/mod/lazurite)) + [Entity Texture Features [ETF]](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)  
(For 1.20.1 only: If [Blueprint](https://modrinth.com/mod/blueprint) is installed, also install [Blueprint Texture Issue Fix](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/blueprint-texture-issue-fix))

**Forge Environment (1.19.2-)** :  
[Connectedness](https://modrinth.com/mod/connectedness) + (If installing alongside [Embeddium](https://modrinth.com/mod/embeddium), install [Reforgium](https://modrinth.com/mod/reforgium)) + [Entity Texture Features [ETF]](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)

Do not use [Rubidium](https://modrinth.com/mod/rubidium)! It is outdated! Issues potentially caused by it will not be addressed here! Use [Embeddium](https://modrinth.com/mod/embeddium)!

or

[MoreMcmeta](https://modrinth.com/mod/moremcmeta) + [MoreMcmeta Emissive Textures](https://modrinth.com/mod/moremcmeta-emissive)

or

Shaders with PBR support (e.g., [Complementary Shaders](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined), [iterationT](https://www.minegraph.cn/shaderpacks/12), [iterationRP](https://www.minegraph.cn/shaderpacks/54))

or

[Connected Textures Mod [CTM]](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ctm) (Not recommended, only supports block functionality, entity effects are not supported)

It is recommended to run with shaders for the best experience! (Works without shaders too!)

<details>
<summary>Supported Mods:</summary>

  [The Aether](https://modrinth.com/mod/aether) (Recommended to use together with [Aether Addon: Emissivity](https://modrinth.com/mod/aether-emissivity))
  
  [The Aether: Redux](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-aether-redux)
  
  [Alex's Caves](https://modrinth.com/mod/alexs-caves)
  
  [Ancient Aether](https://modrinth.com/mod/ancient-aether)
  
  [BetterEnd](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterend)
  
  [BetterNether](https://modrinth.com/mod/betternether)
  
  [Biomes O' Plenty](https://modrinth.com/mod/biomes-o-plenty)
  
  [Blue Skies](https://modrinth.com/mod/blue-skies)
  
  [L_Ender 's Cataclysm](https://modrinth.com/mod/l_enders-cataclysm)
  
  [Cinderscapes](https://modrinth.com/mod/cinderscapes)
  
  [Create](https://createmod.net)
  
  [Deeper and Darker](https://kyanitemods.dev/mod/deeperdarker)
  
  [DivineRPG](https://modrinth.com/mod/divinerpg)
  
  [Exp Ore](https://modrinth.com/mod/exp-ore)
  
  [Galosphere](https://modrinth.com/mod/galosphere)
  
  [Aether Gravitation](https://modrinth.com/mod/aether-gravitation)
  
  [Ice and Fire](https://modrinth.com/mod/ice-and-fire-dragons)
  
  [Nature's Spirit](https://modrinth.com/mod/natures-spirit) (The built-in emissive textures in Nature's Spirit have problems; this pack rewrites them, so there's no need to use the built-in version)
  
  [The Outer End](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-outer-end)
  
  [Quark](https://quarkmod.net)
  
  [Stalwart Dungeons](https://modrinth.com/mod/stalwart-dungeons)

  [Tinkers' Construct 3](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/tinkers-construct)
  
  [Waystones](https://modrinth.com/mod/waystones)
</details>

Currently working on compatibility with [Eternal Starlight](https://modrinth.com/mod/eternal-starlight)……
